buildLog.reasoning: Started with simplest policy type to validate the architecture. MPC key simulation with deterministic ethers.js wallets.
Added rate-limiter as it models real agent behavior better than simple caps. Sliding window with configurable cooldown period.
Circuit breaker stops spending after anomaly detection triggers. Encrypted secrets implement the core 'keep secrets' track premise.

commits: v0.7.0 - ZK compliance proofs + frontend UI
v0.9.0 - patient drain simulator + UI cards
buildLog.reasoning: ZK proof generation proves policy compliance without revealing transaction history. Anomaly detector catches patient drain attacks (slow exfiltration). Frontend for judges to interact with live APIs.

commits: v1.0.0 - SKILL.md agent discovery + conversation log + build summary
buildLog.reasoning: Added machine-readable agent skill manifest for other agents to discover and interact with Agent Vault. Conversation log documents the full build process as required by SYNTHESIS.

architectureDecisions: Used deterministic ethers.js wallets to simulate Lit Protocol PKPs without testnet dependencies
MongoDB for audit trail persistence - every action is immutable once logged
ZK proofs use ECDSA attestation pattern (not ZK-SNARK) for hackathon feasibility
5-signal anomaly detection catches patient drain attacks that per-transaction limits miss
Express middleware pattern for policy injection - all transfers go through policy chain
